'''鈭歞h-y-th''' ('''kadhayath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quagmire|quagmire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quagmire|quagmire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-y-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadhayath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhayath|thidhayath]] || [[word:jidhayath|jidhayath]] || [[word:shidhayath|shidhayath]] || [[word:kidhayath|kidhayath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhayath|thuthudhayath]] || [[word:jujudhayath|jujudhayath]] || [[word:shushudhayath|shushudhayath]] || [[word:kukudhayath|kukudhayath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhayath|thudhayath]] || [[word:judhayath|judhayath]] || [[word:shudhayath|shudhayath]] || [[word:kudhayath|kudhayath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhayath|thudhayath]] || [[word:judhayath|judhayath]] || [[word:shudhayath|shudhayath]] || [[word:kudhayath|kudhayath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhayath|thedhayath]] || [[word:jedhayath|jedhayath]] || [[word:shedhayath|shedhayath]] || [[word:kedhayath|kedhayath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhayath|thothodhayath]] || [[word:jojodhayath|jojodhayath]] || [[word:shoshodhayath|shoshodhayath]] || [[word:kokodhayath|kokodhayath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhayath|thodhayath]] || [[word:jodhayath|jodhayath]] || [[word:shodhayath|shodhayath]] || [[word:kodhayath|kodhayath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhayath|thodhayath]] || [[word:jodhayath|jodhayath]] || [[word:shodhayath|shodhayath]] || [[word:kodhayath|kodhayath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]] || [[word:dhayath|dhayath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhayath|th忙dhayath]] || [[word:j忙dhayath|j忙dhayath]] || [[word:sh忙dhayath|sh忙dhayath]] || [[word:k忙dhayath|k忙dhayath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhayath|thathadhayath]] || [[word:jajadhayath|jajadhayath]] || [[word:shashadhayath|shashadhayath]] || [[word:kakadhayath|kakadhayath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhayath|thadhayath]] || [[word:jadhayath|jadhayath]] || [[word:shadhayath|shadhayath]] || [[word:kadhayath|kadhayath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhayath|thadhayath]] || [[word:jadhayath|jadhayath]] || [[word:shadhayath|shadhayath]] || [[word:kadhayath|kadhayath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhayath|shadhayath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhayath|goshadhayath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhayath|gokishadhayath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhayathn眉|shadhayathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkn眉|goshadhayathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayathn眉|gokishadhayathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhayathsh毛|shadhayathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhayathnksh毛|goshadhayathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhayathsh毛|gokishadhayathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayathro|shadhayathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkro|goshadhayathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayathro|gokishadhayathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayathmu|shadhayathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkmu|goshadhayathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayathmu|gokishadhayathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhayathsher|shadhayathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhayathnksher|goshadhayathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhayathsher|gokishadhayathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhayathng|shadhayathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkng|goshadhayathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhayathng|gokishadhayathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhayathya|shadhayathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkya|goshadhayathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhayathya|gokishadhayathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhayathyam|shadhayathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkyam|goshadhayathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhayathyam|gokishadhayathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayathn眉sh毛|shadhayathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkn眉sh毛|goshadhayathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayathn眉sh毛|gokishadhayathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayathn眉ro|shadhayathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkn眉ro|goshadhayathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayathn眉ro|gokishadhayathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayathn眉mu|shadhayathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkn眉mu|goshadhayathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayathn眉mu|gokishadhayathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayathsh毛n眉|shadhayathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayathnksh毛n眉|goshadhayathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayathsh毛n眉|gokishadhayathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayathsh毛ro|shadhayathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayathnksh毛ro|goshadhayathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayathsh毛ro|gokishadhayathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayathsh毛mu|shadhayathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayathnksh毛mu|goshadhayathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayathsh毛mu|gokishadhayathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayathron眉|shadhayathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkron眉|goshadhayathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayathron眉|gokishadhayathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayathrosh毛|shadhayathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkrosh毛|goshadhayathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayathrosh毛|gokishadhayathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayathromu|shadhayathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkromu|goshadhayathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayathromu|gokishadhayathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayathmun眉|shadhayathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkmun眉|goshadhayathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayathmun眉|gokishadhayathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayathmush毛|shadhayathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkmush毛|goshadhayathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayathmush毛|gokishadhayathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayathmuro|shadhayathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayathnkmuro|goshadhayathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayathmuro|gokishadhayathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
